name: videorc
description: AI-native recording and livestreaming studio technical spike.
author: TheOrcDev

scripts.package:desktop: pnpm package:backend && pnpm ffmpeg:build:macos && pnpm --filter @videorc/desktop package
scripts.dist:desktop: pnpm package:backend && pnpm ffmpeg:build:macos && pnpm --filter @videorc/desktop dist
scripts.dist:desktop:signed: pnpm package:backend && pnpm ffmpeg:build:macos && pnpm --filter @videorc/desktop dist:signed
